tenant.mapAvailable: Map view is available for your home.
tenant.mapUnavailable: Map view will appear once coordinates are available.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.imageConsentDesc: Allow displaying your Google profile image in the app (GDPR compliant).
settings.fiscalResidencyHelp: The country where you are tax resident — determines which tax rules apply to your rental income.
settings.nhrStatusHelp: NHR grants a flat 20% tax rate on Portuguese-source income for 10 years. Only valid if granted before Jan 2024.
settings.ificiStatusHelp: IFICI (Incentivo Fiscal à Investigação Científica e Inovação) replaced NHR for new applicants from 2024. Flat 20% rate.
settings.taxRegimeMutuallyExclusive: NHR and IFICI are mutually exclusive — only one can be active at a time.

gdpr.title: Your Data Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.description: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, export, or delete your personal data.

database.title: Admin Database View
database.description: Read-only view of database tables. Access logged for GDPR compliance.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to your property management dashboard
dashboard.addPropertiesToStart: Add your first property to get started
dashboard.addTenantsToSeeActivity: Add tenants and record payments to see activity here
dashboard.achievementsDescription: Milestones and recognitions for your property management success
dashboard.activityFeedPlaceholder: Your activity feed will appear here
dashboard.startManagingPortfolioDesc: Add your first property to unlock stats, analytics, and financial tracking across your entire portfolio.
dashboard.ownerTitle: Stay ahead of overdue rent, expiring leases, and receipt follow-up.

dashboard.paidRentPosted: Paid rent already posted this month

dashboard.noLeasesNeedReview: No active leases need review right now.
dashboard.latestPaymentActivity: Latest payment activity across the portfolio.
dashboard.thisWeekActivitySubtitle: Keep rent, leases, and receipt output moving without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.addPropertyDesc: Start by adding a property — apartment, house, or commercial building.
dashboard.addPropertyDesc2: Start with an apartment, house, or commercial unit.
dashboard.addTenantDesc: Add tenant details and assign them to a property.
dashboard.createLeaseDesc: Define rent, dates, and terms for the tenancy.
dashboard.recordPaymentDesc: Log your first rent payment to unlock revenue analytics.
dashboard.featPropertiesDesc: Track units, addresses, rent amounts, and occupancy status in one place.
dashboard.featTenantsDesc: Manage tenant profiles, lease terms, and payment histories effortlessly.
dashboard.featFinancialsDesc: Monitor income, overdue rent, and expenses with automatic summaries.
dashboard.tenantTitle: Keep your lease, payments, and shared documents in one calm place.
dashboard.tenantSubtitle: Review your next rent, confirm lease details, and access receipts in one place.
dashboard.paymentStatusPaid: Your latest rent record is marked as received.
dashboard.paymentStatusOverdue: A payment needs attention. Contact the owner.
dashboard.myLeaseSubtitle: Everything you need about your current home and agreement.
dashboard.whatYouCanDoNowSubtitle: Open the main tenant tasks directly from here.
dashboard.recentReceiptsSubtitle: Latest payment confirmations linked to your lease.
dashboard.useLeaseHistory: Use your lease and receipt history as the source of truth before contacting the owner.
dashboard.actionPanelSubtitle: What needs your attention right now.

dashboard.allClearDesc: No outstanding rent, overdue payments, or urgent maintenance.

landing.hero: Collect rent. Issue receipts. Stay compliant.
landing.subtitle: Domora automates the monthly compliance cycle for landlords in Portugal and Spain — from payment follow-up to AT electronic receipts and IRS / IRPF tax exports.
landing.microcopy: No card. No setup. Guided walkthrough in under 2 minutes.

chips.simple: One flow from rent to receipt

preview.label: Live product preview
preview.title: From overdue rent to tax-ready records
preview.subtitle: A single workflow, not a fragmented dashboard.

detect.title: Overdue rent detected
detect.description: See the next action for today in one queue.

receipt.title: Payment logged and receipt issued
receipt.description: Generate the document without leaving the flow.

compliance.title: PT/ES tax context applied
compliance.description: Country profile stays linked to the same payment record.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to close the collection loop
howItWorks.subtitle: See what happens between overdue rent, receipt issuance, and tax-ready output in one workflow.

collect.title: Prioritize today's collection work
collect.description: The queue shows who needs immediate follow-up by contract and property.

issue.title: Log payment and issue instantly
issue.description: As soon as payment is recorded, the receipt is generated in the same flow.

report.title: Export with PT/ES context
report.description: Payment data and tax profile stay linked for reporting and audit trails.

demo.label: Demo mode
demo.title: Explore one portal from both sides
demo.subtitle: Start in owner mode for full portfolio control or switch to tenant mode for a self-service view of one lease.
demo.ownerDescription: See the full portfolio, tenants, payments, documents, and tax workflows.
demo.tenantDescription: See one property, one lease, payments, receipts, and shared documents.

features.title: Everything a landlord needs, nothing they don't

rentCollection.title: Rent Collection
rentCollection.description: Track due dates, log payments, and follow up on overdue rent — all in one queue.

receipts.title: Instant Receipts
receipts.description: Issue compliant rent receipts the moment a payment is logged. PDF-ready.

taxCompliance.title: PT/ES Tax Compliance
taxCompliance.description: Tax profiles stay linked to each property. Export-ready for AT and Hacienda.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Tracking
maintenance.description: Log tickets, assign vendors, track costs. Expenses auto-link to the property.

leaseManagement.title: Lease Management
leaseManagement.description: Create, renew, and terminate leases. Auto-renew alerts keep you ahead of deadlines.

tenantPortal.title: Tenant Portal
tenantPortal.description: Tenants see their own lease, payments, and receipts — fewer emails for you.

pricing.title: Start free. Scale when you need to.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes the full workflow. Upgrade for more properties and team access.
pricing.selfHostedNote: Prefer to self-host? The open-source version is always free.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For active landlords with a growing portfolio.

business.name: Business
business.description: For property managers running larger portfolios.

closingCta.title: Ready to simplify your rentals?
closingCta.subtitle: Try the full workflow free — properties, tenants, leases, and receipts in one place.

timeline.title: One workflow. From rent due to export ready.
timeline.subtitle: Every step tracked, every record linked.

export.title: Export ready
export.description: Tax-ready record for AT or Hacienda

tax.title: Tax Calculation
tax.rendaAcessivelDescription: Affordable rent programme — flat 10% IRS rate for rents below €2,300/month
tax.deduction90: 90% deduction — rent reduced ≥5% vs. prior contract
tax.deduction70: 70% deduction — first rental to tenant aged 18-35

landing.title: Tenant Portal
landing.description: Your portal link was sent to you by email when your tenancy was set up.
landing.step1: Check your email inbox for a message from your landlord or property manager.
landing.step2: Open the email and click the "Access your portal" button or link.
landing.step3: If you can't find the email, check your spam or junk folder.
landing.contactManager: Contact your property manager if you need a new link.

errors.invalidLink: Invalid or expired portal link. Please contact your property manager.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load portal data. Please try again later.
errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect. Please check your internet connection.
